summary: Draft SysDolphin baselib matching-improvement slice split from #2617, touching cobj, hsd_3B34, particle, sislib, and synth. The diff mostly adjusts stack/local ordering, data/string relocation references, report/panic string arguments, and small expression forms. The PR was closed unmerged and explicitly superseded by combined Dolphin support split PR #2632.

key_files.role: Primary changed file; replaces many inline OSReport strings with lbl_ data-label offsets, adds a static MCC error string blob, adjusts exception reporting string references, and simplifies an OSContext pointer access.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: particle.c added 130 deleted 77 hunks 8
raw_diff: particle.c fn_80392CD8 adds lbl_8040A540 and changes MCC messages to lbl_8040A540 offsets
raw_diff: particle.c hsd_803931A4 uses extern lbl_8040A8E0/lbl_8040A904 for OSReport
raw_diff: particle.c Exception_ReportStackTrace and Exception_ReportCodeline use lbl_8040AB00 offsets
raw_diff: particle.c hsd_80395D88 removes ctx_ptr and uses sp->xD4 directly

key_files.role: Adds a narrow stack-padding tactic in HSD_CObjSetUpVector.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: cobj.c added 1 deleted 0 hunks 1
raw_diff: cobj.c HSD_CObjSetUpVector adds PAD_STACK(4)
changed_files.jsonl: hsd_3B34.c added 2 deleted 2 hunks 1
raw_diff: hsd_3B34.c moves jmp_buf/temp_r4 assignments after sp8/spC initialization

key_files.role: Changes OSPanic empty-string arguments to a known HSD_SisLib data symbol cast.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: sislib.c added 3 deleted 3 hunks 3
raw_diff: sislib.c HSD_SisLib_803A5798 replaces OSPanic empty literal with (char*) HSD_SisLib_804D6390 at three panic sites

key_files.role: Simplifies a signed comparison expression in HSD_Synth_8038ADD0.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: synth.c added 1 deleted 1 hunks 1
raw_diff: synth.c changes (u32)(x8 + 0x10000) == -1U to x8 == -0x10001

what_changed: PR body says this was split from #2617 by directory/subsystem for easier review, scoped to src/sysdolphin/baselib.
The changed files are cobj.c, hsd_3B34.c, particle.c, sislib.c, and synth.c.
particle.c received the largest diff, including a static lbl_8040A540 character blob for MCC error/report strings and many OSReport calls changed from inline literals to label-plus-offset references.
particle.c also introduces extern labels lbl_8040A8E0, lbl_8040A904, and lbl_8040AB00 for report strings used by EXI initialization and exception reporting.
particle.c changes hsd_80395D88 to use sp->xD4 directly instead of an intermediate OSContext** ctx_ptr.
hsd_3B34.c reorders assignment statements in hsd_803B46D4.
sislib.c changes three OSPanic calls from an inline empty string argument to (char*) HSD_SisLib_804D6390.
synth.c rewrites an arithmetic unsigned comparison as a direct signed equality check against -0x10001.
The PR was closed with an issue comment saying it was superseded by PR #2632, which kept Dolphin support changes together for review and CI.

smart_moves.text: The PR body explicitly scoped the slice to src/sysdolphin/baselib and listed all touched files, making review boundaries searchable.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Scope and Files sections

smart_moves.text: The body separated preliminary full-branch metrics from authoritative per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting, reducing overclaiming for the split slice.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Preliminary Report says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative once complete

smart_moves.text: A local whitespace/syntax hygiene check was reported for the isolated path slice.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Local Checks says git diff --check origin/master...HEAD passed

smart_moves.text: The follow-up comment redirected review to a combined Dolphin support split when the initial directory split was not the chosen review shape.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: superseded by #2632

decomp_lessons.lesson: For split PRs, keep full-branch progress metrics clearly labeled as preliminary and avoid treating them as slice validation until per-PR CI/decomp-dev results exist.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Preliminary Report
human_pr_text: Per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting on this draft is authoritative once complete

decomp_lessons.lesson: Subsystem path slices can improve reviewability, but tightly related Dolphin support changes may still need to be reviewed together if the split creates awkward CI/review boundaries.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Split from #2617 by directory/subsystem so matching improvements are easier to review
text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: Superseded by combined Dolphin support split PR #2632

decomp_lessons.lesson: String-relocation cleanup in partially matched functions is evidence-sensitive: this PR used lbl_ data labels and offsets where comments mention relocation-only mismatches, but the slice does not provide enough evidence to promote those replacements as general style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: particle.c comments 'Currently 99.94% match - minor relocation difference'
raw_diff: particle.c comments 'instructions match, string relocations differ'
raw_diff: particle.c replaces many inline strings with msg + offsets

naming_conventions.convention: Address-style names were retained for uncertain functions and labels, including fn_80392CD8, hsd_803931A4, lbl_8040A540, lbl_8040A8E0, lbl_8040A904, and lbl_8040AB00.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: particle.c symbol names in changed hunks

naming_conventions.convention: Temporary/local register-derived names such as temp_r4 remain in hsd_3B34.c where the diff does not prove stronger semantics.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B34.c hsd_803B46D4 local variables and assignment reorder

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK(4) added in HSD_CObjSetUpVector to influence stack layout.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: cobj.c adds PAD_STACK(4)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Loaded standards require explicit build/objdiff/regression evidence for PAD_STACK; this PR body does not provide narrow objdiff evidence for this specific function.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Declaration/assignment ordering changed in hsd_803B46D4, moving jmp_buf and temp_r4 initialization after sp8/spC loads.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B34.c hsd_803B46D4
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: No function-specific verifier output is included in the slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: String literals and report format strings in particle.c were replaced by address-style data labels and explicit offsets to alter relocation behavior.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: particle.c lbl_8040A540 blob and OSReport offset changes
raw_diff: particle.c lbl_8040AB00 offset changes
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This conflicts with current loaded standards unless data ownership/section evidence justifies it; the PR is closed unmerged and superseded.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: An intermediate pointer-to-field local was removed in favor of direct sp->xD4 field access in hsd_80395D88.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: particle.c hsd_80395D88 removes ctx_ptr and uses sp->xD4

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A mathematically equivalent comparison was rewritten from an unsigned add-and-compare form to a direct signed equality.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: synth.c HSD_Synth_8038ADD0 comparison rewrite

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: OSpanic empty-string arguments in sislib.c were redirected to a data symbol cast, likely affecting relocation/data reference shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: sislib.c OSPanic calls use (char*) HSD_SisLib_804D6390
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The slice does not include data ownership evidence for HSD_SisLib_804D6390.

notes: The diff and PR metadata are complete enough to identify changed files and tactics.
The PR is closed with merged_at null and was superseded by #2632, so no acceptance or merge status should be inferred.
The PR body reports preliminary full unsplit branch metrics and explicitly says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative once complete; no per-PR CI result is loaded.
There are no loaded review comments or formal reviews.
Several changes touch strings/data labels and relocation-sensitive code, but the slice does not include section ownership, symbol metadata, objdiff, or checkdiff evidence for individual edits.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Split PR validation wording
accepted_candidate_records.text: When a PR is a path/subsystem slice from a larger matching branch, record whether progress metrics belong to the full unsplit branch or to the actual PR slice; treat per-PR CI/decomp-dev output as authoritative when available.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Preliminary Report
human_pr_text: Per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting on this draft is the authoritative slice score once it completes

accepted_candidate_records.title: Superseded split shape
accepted_candidate_records.text: A directory/subsystem split can be superseded by a combined support split when related Dolphin support changes are better kept together for review and CI.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: split by directory/subsystem for easier review
text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: superseded by #2632

source_update_candidates.title: Relocation-only string fixes need explicit evidence
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding an example note that replacing inline OSReport or panic strings with lbl_ address labels and offsets is a data/relocation tactic, not ordinary cleanup, and should be kept only with section ownership, symbol metadata, or narrow objdiff/checkdiff evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: particle.c comments identify minor/string relocation differences
raw_diff: particle.c replaces inline strings with lbl_8040A540/lbl_8040AB00 offsets
raw_diff: sislib.c replaces empty panic string with HSD_SisLib_804D6390
source_update_candidates.reason: The loaded global standards already warn against string-literal symbol regression and require evidence for matching tactics; this PR provides a concrete cautionary example but is closed unmerged and lacks verifier evidence.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR's full-branch matched-code/data percentages as slice results; the body labels per-PR CI/decomp-dev as authoritative and no such output is loaded.
Do not treat lbl_8040A540, lbl_8040A8E0, lbl_8040A904, lbl_8040AB00, or HSD_SisLib_804D6390 string substitutions as accepted style based on this PR alone.
Do not infer reviewer approval or merge acceptance; the PR has no reviews, no review comments, merged_at null, and was superseded.
Do not claim PAD_STACK(4) was verified for HSD_CObjSetUpVector; no narrow objdiff/build evidence is present in the slice.
